history.en: One of the first 'designer breeds' with intentional breeding starting in the United States in the 1960s. Goal was to combine the outgoing, loving personality of the Cocker Spaniel with the low-shedding, intelligent nature of the Poodle to create a healthy companion dog
history.zh: 最早的设计师犬种之一，1960年代在美国开始有意培育。目标是结合可卡犬外向、可爱的性格与贵宾犬低脱毛、聪明的特质，创造健康的伴侣犬。

overview.en: The Cockapoo is a delightful mixed breed that combines the best traits of the Cocker Spaniel and the Poodle. Known for being friendly, intelligent, affectionate, playful, and outgoing, this designer dog was first intentionally bred in the United States during the 1960s. The goal was to create a healthy, loving companion with the Cocker Spaniel's warm personality and the Poodle's low-shedding, clever nature. Cockapoos typically have a soft, wavy or curly coat that comes in many colors. They are highly adaptable, making them wonderful family pets. Their cheerful disposition and eagerness to please mean they thrive on human interaction and are generally good with children and other animals. While they are small to medium-sized, their energy level is moderate, requiring regular activity to stay happy. Overall, the Cockapoo is a loyal, joyful companion that brings warmth and liveliness to any home.
overview.zh: 可卡普犬是一种令人愉悦的混种犬，结合了可卡犬和贵宾犬的最佳特质。它以其友好、聪明、深情、活泼和外向的性格而闻名，这种设计犬最早于20世纪60年代在美国有意培育，旨在创造一种健康、充满爱心的伴侣犬，兼具可卡犬温暖个性和贵宾犬低脱毛、聪明的特点。可卡普犬通常拥有柔软、波浪或卷曲的被毛，颜色多样。它们适应性强，是极佳的家庭宠物。其开朗的性格和取悦主人的意愿使其非常依赖人类互动，通常对孩子和其他动物友好。虽然体型中小，但能量水平适中，需要定期活动以保持快乐。总体而言，可卡普犬是一种忠诚、欢乐的伴侣，为任何家庭带来温暖与活力。

care.en: Daily care for a Cockapoo involves a consistent routine to maintain their health and happiness. Grooming is essential due to their coat, which can be wavy or curly. Brush them at least three times a week to prevent mats and tangles, and schedule professional grooming every six to eight weeks for trimming and ear cleaning. Their floppy ears are prone to infections, so check weekly and clean gently with a vet-recommended solution. Exercise needs are moderate: aim for 30 to 60 minutes of activity daily, including walks, playtime, and mental stimulation like puzzle toys. Cockapoos are energetic but not hyperactive, so a fenced yard or regular park visits are ideal. Veterinary visits should occur annually for check-ups, vaccinations, and dental care. Keep an eye on their weight to avoid obesity, and trim their nails monthly. With proper grooming, exercise, and vet care, your Cockapoo will thrive.
care.zh: 可卡普犬的日常护理需要一致的常规，以保持其健康和快乐。由于被毛可能波浪或卷曲，美容至关重要。每周至少梳理三次，防止打结和缠结，并每六到八周安排专业美容，包括修剪和耳朵清洁。它们下垂的耳朵容易感染，应每周检查并用兽医推荐溶液轻柔清洁。运动需求适中：每天30到60分钟活动，包括散步、玩耍和益智玩具等精神刺激。可卡普犬精力充沛但不亢奋，有围栏的院子或定期去公园是理想选择。每年应带它进行兽医检查、疫苗接种和牙齿护理。注意体重以防肥胖，并每月修剪指甲。通过适当的美容、运动和兽医护理，您的可卡普犬将茁壮成长。

training.en: Training a Cockapoo is generally a rewarding experience due to their intelligence and eagerness to please. They respond best to positive reinforcement methods, such as treats, praise, and play, rather than harsh corrections. Start training early, focusing on basic commands like sit, stay, come, and leave it. Socialization is crucial: expose your puppy to various people, sounds, environments, and other animals from a young age to build a confident, well-adjusted adult dog. Cockapoos can be sensitive, so use a gentle, consistent tone. Keep training sessions short (5 to 10 minutes) and fun to maintain their attention. Crate training can help with housebreaking and provide a safe space. They may inherit a stubborn streak from either parent breed, so patience is key. Advanced training like agility or tricks can channel their energy positively. With consistency and love, your Cockapoo will become a well-mannered companion.
training.zh: 训练可卡普犬通常是一次有益的体验，因为它们聪明且乐于取悦主人。它们对积极强化方法（如零食、表扬和玩耍）反应最佳，而非严厉纠正。尽早开始训练，重点放在基本指令如坐下、停留、过来和放下。社会化至关重要：从小让幼犬接触不同的人、声音、环境和其他动物，以培养自信、适应力强的成年犬。可卡普犬可能敏感，因此使用温和且一致的语调。保持训练时间短（5到10分钟）且有趣，以维持其注意力。笼内训练有助于如厕训练并提供安全空间。它们可能从亲本品种中继承固执倾向，因此耐心是关键。高级训练如敏捷性或技巧可以积极引导其能量。通过一致性和爱，您的可卡普犬将成为举止得体的伴侣。

diet.en: Feeding a Cockapoo requires a balanced diet tailored to their size, age, and activity level. Choose high-quality dry kibble or wet food formulated for small to medium breeds, with real meat as the first ingredient. Puppies need three to four small meals daily, while adults typically do well with two meals per day. Portion control is vital to prevent obesity, as Cockapoos love food and can overeat. Consult your vet for specific calorie needs, generally around 300 to 500 calories per day for an adult, depending on weight and exercise. Include lean proteins, healthy fats, and carbohydrates for energy. Avoid fillers like corn and soy. Fresh water should always be available. Treats should be given sparingly, preferably healthy options like carrots or blueberries. Some Cockapoos may have food allergies, so monitor for skin or digestive issues. A consistent feeding schedule supports digestion and weight management.
diet.zh: 喂养可卡普犬需要根据其体型、年龄和活动水平提供均衡饮食。选择为中小型犬配制的高品质干粮或湿粮，以真实肉类为首要成分。幼犬每天需三到四顿小餐，成年犬通常每天两餐即可。控制份量至关重要，以防肥胖，因为可卡普犬喜爱食物且可能过量进食。咨询兽医以了解特定热量需求，成年犬通常每天约300到500卡路里，取决于体重和运动。包括精益蛋白质、健康脂肪和碳水化合物以提供能量。避免玉米和大豆等填充物。应始终提供新鲜水。零食应适量给予，最好选择健康选项如胡萝卜或蓝莓。部分可卡普犬可能有食物过敏，需监测皮肤或消化问题。一致的喂食时间有助于消化和体重管理。

livingTips.en: Cockapoos are highly adaptable and can thrive in various living environments, including apartments and houses with yards. They are well-suited for apartment living if given sufficient daily exercise and mental stimulation. A securely fenced yard is ideal for safe play, but not essential if you commit to regular walks. Their friendly nature makes them excellent companions for families with children, as they are gentle, playful, and patient. They typically get along well with other dogs and pets, especially if socialized early. However, they can be prone to separation anxiety if left alone for long periods, so they do best in homes where someone is present most of the day. Cockapoos are indoor dogs and should not live outdoors exclusively. They appreciate cozy bedding and a designated space. With proper attention, exercise, and companionship, they will be happy in almost any home setting, making them a versatile and beloved family member.
livingTips.zh: 可卡普犬适应性极强，能在各种生活环境中茁壮成长，包括公寓和带院子的房屋。如果每天给予足够的运动和智力刺激，它们非常适合公寓生活。有安全围栏的院子是理想的安全玩耍场所，但如果您坚持定期散步，则非必需。其友善天性使它们成为有孩子家庭的绝佳伴侣，因为它们温和、活泼且有耐心。它们通常能与其他狗和宠物和睦相处，尤其是早期社会化后。然而，如果长时间独处，它们可能容易产生分离焦虑，因此最适合白天有人陪伴的家庭。可卡普犬是室内犬，不应完全户外生活。它们喜欢舒适的床铺和专属空间。通过适当的关注、运动和陪伴，它们几乎在任何家庭环境中都会快乐，使其成为多才多艺且深受喜爱的家庭成员。
